title: leucanthemum maroccanum
intro: Leucanthemum maroccanum, also known as Moroccan daisy or white Moroccan daisy, is a flowering plant species native to North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum maroccanum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Leucanthemum maroccanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile plant for traditional and modern herbal remedies.
